text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Did you change your engine or something,
Machitan?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Then how did you get so crazy fast all of a
sudden?! You definitely did something!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what to say. I'm just plain old me,
you get what you see...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm eating like normal, sleeping like normal,
training like normal...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Although, my trainer's been teaching me a bunch
of things, like how to use my legs better and how
to mentally prepare for races.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I get it now. I'm still ordinary, but my trainer is
special!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
In other words, your trainer is your engine,
Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I like the sound of that! It's like we're part
of a well-oiled machine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, Matikanetannhauser thanks me
over and over!
